    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    S

    saveFullGame(WorldMap, Player, Player, int) - Static method in class jogo.io.FileHandler
    Serializes the current game state, including active players, world map structures, and the current day progression, into a CSV file.
    searchResources(Player, ResourceType) - Static method in class jogo.engine.GameEngine
    Prevents player soft-locking by allowing manual resource gathering without requiring structures.
    searchResourcesMenu() - Method in class jogo.screens.SearchResourcesScreen
    Instantiates the core layout nodes, maps structural subsections, appends styles, and wraps the gathering catalog inside a definitive Scene.
    SearchResourcesScreen - Class in jogo.screens
    Controller and view class responsible for rendering the resource gathering interface.
    SearchResourcesScreen(Stage, GameSession) - Constructor for class jogo.screens.SearchResourcesScreen
    Constructs a new SearchResourcesScreen viewport context.
    SelectPlayersNameScreen - Class in jogo.screens
    Controller and view class responsible for handling player identity registration.
    SelectPlayersNameScreen(Stage, GameSession) - Constructor for class jogo.screens.SelectPlayersNameScreen
    Constructs a new SelectPlayersNameScreen configuration view.
    setLevel(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.City
     
    setLevel(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Forest
     
    setLevel(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Mine
     
    setLevel(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Ranch
     
    setLevel(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Structures
     
    setUp() - Method in class io.FileHandlerTest
     
    setUp() - Method in class jogo.engine.EventsTest
    Creates a new Events object before each test.
    setUp() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameEngineTest
    Creates a new map and a new player before each test.
    setUp() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameSessionTest
    Creates a new GameSession before each test.
    setUp() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Creates a new player and a new empty map before each test.
    setUp() - Method in class models.PlayerTest
    Creates a new player before each test.
    setUp() - Method in class models.Structures.CityTest
    Creates a new player and a new City before each test.
    setUp() - Method in class models.Structures.ForestTest
    Creates a new player and a new Forest before each test.
    setUp() - Method in class models.Structures.MineTest
    Creates a new player and a new Mine before each test.
    setUp() - Method in class models.Structures.RanchTest
    Creates a new player and a new Ranch before each test.
    setUp() - Method in class models.Structures.StructuresBaseTest
    Creates a new player and a new structure before each test.
    show(String) - Static method in class jogo.screens.ErrorPopUp
    Spawns and displays a synchronous application-modal error dialog window presenting the provided message string alongside standardized graphical warning indicators.
    SpaceAlreadyOccupiedException - Exception Class in jogo.exceptions
    Thrown when a player attempts to place or construct a structure on a map tile that is already occupied by another structure.
    SpaceAlreadyOccupiedException() - Constructor for exception class jogo.exceptions.SpaceAlreadyOccupiedException
    Constructs a new SpaceAlreadyOccupiedException with a default error message.
    spaceIsNotOccupied() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if an empty map position is correctly detected as not occupied.
    spaceIsOccupied() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if a map position is correctly detected as occupied.
    spaceIsOccupiedOutsideMap() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if checking occupation outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.
    start(Stage) - Method in class jogo.Main
    Confirms the primary JavaFX stage boundaries, hooks the initial game session state, and renders the startup environment scene.
    startDayEvent() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameSession
    Triggers a random daily event, updates the session's current resource and score modifiers based on the event's outcome, and returns the event message.
    startNewGame(String, String) - Method in class jogo.engine.GameSession
    Initializes a new game session from scratch, creating a fresh world map, resetting both players, and setting the calendar back to day 1.
    StartScreen - Class in jogo.screens
    The primary entry-point viewport and main menu controller.
    StartScreen(Stage, GameSession) - Constructor for class jogo.screens.StartScreen
    Constructs a baseline StartScreen container matching the main application context window.
    STONE - Enum constant in enum class jogo.models.ResourceType
    Represents stone material used primarily for advanced structures and upgrades.
    STRUCTURE_TYPE - Variable in class jogo.models.Structures.Structures
     
    StructureDontExistException - Exception Class in jogo.exceptions
    Thrown when an operation attempts to interact with or retrieve a structure from a map coordinate that is currently empty.
    StructureDontExistException() - Constructor for exception class jogo.exceptions.StructureDontExistException
    Constructs a new StructureDontExistException with a default error message.
    Structures - Class in jogo.models.Structures
    Abstract baseline class for all architectural structures within the game world.
    Structures(StructuresType, ResourceType, ResourceType, int, int, Player, ResourceType, int, int, int) - Constructor for class jogo.models.Structures.Structures
    Constructs the structural foundations, binds it to an owner, and injects the initial architectural score value into the player's records.
    StructuresBaseTest - Class in models.Structures
    Test class for the base Structures class.
    StructuresBaseTest() - Constructor for class models.Structures.StructuresBaseTest
     
    StructuresBuildingInfoScreen - Class in jogo.screens
    Controller and view class responsible for rendering structural construction blueprint specifications.
    StructuresBuildingInfoScreen(GameSession, Stage, Runnable) - Constructor for class jogo.screens.StructuresBuildingInfoScreen
    Constructs an operational blueprint information context.
    StructureScreen - Class in jogo.screens
    Controller and view class responsible for displaying the inspection properties of an existing building structure deployed on the map grid.
    StructureScreen(Stage, GameSession, int, int, Runnable) - Constructor for class jogo.screens.StructureScreen
    Constructs a new StructureScreen inspection context window.
    StructuresType - Enum Class in jogo.models.Structures
    Defines the categories of architectural structures that can be built on the map grid.
    successfullyCreatePlayerFromSave() - Method in class models.PlayerTest
    Tests if a player is successfully created using saved data.
    successfullyCreatePlayerFromScratch() - Method in class models.PlayerTest
    Tests if a player is successfully created using the basic constructor.
    successfullyResetTheAP() - Method in class models.PlayerTest
    Tests if the player's Action Points are reset correctly.
